title: focus pouch GUI and equip parity
implemented: Focus pouch storage now uses original NBT list Inventory with byte Slot and full ItemStack data.
Legacy count-only Foci storage is migrated into original Inventory slots.
Added 18-slot focus-only FocusPouchContainer with max stack size 1.
Added ContainerFocusPouch coordinate parity for focus slots, inventory and hotbar.
Added GuiFocusPouch texture, 175x232 dimensions and selected hotbar slot overlay.
Registered FocusPouchBaubleItem marker and FocusPouch menu/screen.
Pouch focus cycling preserves exact focus ItemStack/NBT instead of only focus ids.
forge_1_19_2_adapters: Baubles BELT equip is preserved as a marker adapter because Baubles API is not part of the Forge 1.19.2 base port.
WandManager.changeFocus is partially adapted through offhand pouch + wand interaction until full packet/key flow parity is implemented.
